productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Green Passport Holder
description: Dark green colour imitation snakeskin passport holder.  A super practical accessory that will keep all your important items safely in one place while you travel.  Be the envy of the check-in queue with this sophisticated and stylish passport holderMade of 100% polyurethane embossed with snakeskin effect for durabilityOn right side: Ten card slots, one clear id card slot plus zipped compartmentOn left side: Three slotsPen holder in centreZipper fastening to close passport holder to keep all your documents safe insideMetallic logo on frontCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
